CREATE TABLE charset_test (id INT, charset_name VARCHAR(255));
SELECT * FROM charset_test WHERE charset_name IN (SELECT charsets_list(0));
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM charset_test WHERE charset_name = (SELECT aref(charsets_list(1), 0));
SELECT charset_name FROM charset_test WHERE charset_name IN (SELECT aref(charsets_list(1), n) FROM (SELECT 0 AS n UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3));
SELECT charset_name FROM charset_test WHERE charset_name LIKE (SELECT CONCAT('%', aref(charsets_list(1), n), '%') FROM (SELECT 0 AS n UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2));
WITH CharsetAlias AS (SELECT * FROM charset_test WHERE charset_name = 'UTF-8') SELECT * FROM CharsetAlias;
SELECT charsets_list(1) AS charset_array WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM charset_test) > 0;
SELECT charset_name FROM charset_test WHERE charset_name NOT IN (SELECT charsets_list(1));
SELECT DISTINCT charset_name FROM charset_test WHERE charset_name IN (SELECT aref(charsets_list(0), n) FROM (SELECT 0 AS n UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2));
